module.name: agenda
module.description: Talk agenda / outline with an optional "you are here" highlight. Body = one section per agenda item. Great as a recurring section divider.
module.aiSpec:
An AGENDA / outline list — the talk's sections, optionally with the CURRENT one highlighted ("you are here"). Reuse the same @agenda on each section-divider slide, changing only `current`. Block module: split the body with `<!-- @ -->`, one section per item (Markdown). Parameters: `current` (number, default 0) is the 1-based index of the item to highlight — it dims the rest; 0 highlights nothing. `numbered` (boolean, default true) shows/hides the circled item numbers. `color` (default var(--accent-color)) sets the highlight and number accent color.
Example: <!-- @agenda current: 2 --> Background <!-- @ --> Method <!-- @ --> Results <!-- @ --> Conclusion <!-- @end -->

param.name: current
param.label: Current item (1-based)
param.desc: 1-based index of the item you are on; 0 = none highlighted

param.name: numbered
param.label: Show numbers
param.desc: Show a circled number before each item

param.name: color
param.label: Accent color
param.desc: Color of the highlight and item numbers

snippet.label: Agenda (with current)
snippet.text: <!-- @agenda current: 1 --> **Background** and motivation <!-- @ --> Proposed method <!-- @ --> Experiments <!-- @ --> Conclusion <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Outline list; `current: n` highlights the section you're on (dims the rest).
